name: English Muffins (Lerner)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix warm water, dry yeast, vegetable oil, and salt.
2. Gradually beat in the white flour, followed by the whole wheat flour until a dough forms.
3. Oil the surface of the dough and allow it to proof until lightened in color, about 25 minutes.
4. Knead the dough lightly until soft.
5. Cut into 6 pieces and roll each piece in cornmeal.
6. Form each ball into muffins, approximately 3.5 inches in diameter.
7. Place on a baking sheet.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F and bake for 15 minutes.
